channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Budget-conscious shoppers are feeding a boom in discount groceries
item.description: Many facing economic pressures and frustrations have begun shopping at budget grocery stores and warehouse clubs in lieu of traditional supermarkets, ...

item.title: As ranks of uninsured grow, charity care can be hard to come by at many hospitals
item.description: An investigation of hospital data and charity care programs shows most Minnesota hospitals provide little financial aid to patients and often make ass...

item.title: Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi transferred to a Tehran hospital, her foundation says
item.description: Nobel Peace laureate and activist Narges Mohammadi has been transferred to a Tehran hospital more than a week after collapsing in prison, her foundati...

item.title: Marketers say NAD+ pills and infusions can boost longevity. What's the evidence?
item.description: Wellness and longevity influencers are pushing a compound called NAD+. There's scientific interest in its potential, but researchers say the marketing...
